evals.prompt: Show me a complete example of building a content pipeline that discovers articles from tech blogs, extracts their content, classifies them by topic, and imports them into a CMS.
evals.expected_output: Should reference the content-pipeline scenario from examples/references/scenarios/. Should show the full multi-service pipeline: discover sources (Exa) → map URLs (Firecrawl) → batch read (Jina) → extract structured data (Firecrawl) → classify (Jina) → deduplicate (Jina) → import to CMS.
